name: Aider
description: AI pair programming in the terminal. Works with Git repos, edits multiple files, and commits changes. Supports all major LLMs.

name: Cline
description: Autonomous coding agent for VS Code. Edits files, runs terminal commands, uses browser, and asks for approval on risky steps.

name: Roo Code
description: VS Code extension forked from Cline with multi-agent orchestration, boomerang tasks, and concurrent role-based agents.

name: Continue
description: Open-source AI code assistant for VS Code and JetBrains. Inline chat, edit, and autocomplete with any LLM or local model.

name: Goose (Block)
description: Open-source agentic AI developer assistant from Block. Automates multi-step tasks in your terminal with extensible toolkits.

name: LangGraph
description: Framework for stateful, multi-actor LLM applications as graphs. Cycles, branching, checkpointing, and human-in-the-loop built in.

name: DSPy
description: Framework for programming LMs with declarative signatures and optimizers. Replaces prompt engineering with compiled pipelines.

name: smolagents
description: Hugging Face's minimal agent library. Code agents that write and execute Python, MCP integration, multi-agent support. Under 1k LOC.

name: OpenAI Agents SDK
description: OpenAI's Python SDK for building agentic apps. Agents, handoffs, guardrails, tracing, and tool use with built-in orchestration primitives.

name: Devin
description: Autonomous AI software engineer. Runs in a cloud sandbox with its own shell, browser, and editor. Plans and executes multi-step tasks.

name: Lovable
description: AI-powered full-stack web app builder. Describe what you want, get a working React app with Supabase backend. One-click deploy.

name: Sourcegraph Amp
description: Agentic coding assistant from Sourcegraph. Deep codebase search, multi-file edits, and context from your entire repo history.
